lament:~$ pkg_info | grep rep | grep Lisp

librep-0.13.2       An Emacs Lisp like runtime library
rep-gtk-0.14_1      GTK+ binding for rep Lisp interpreter
rep-gtk-gnome-0.14_1 GTK+ binding for rep Lisp interpreter

Fix: 

lament:~# pkg_add -r sawfish


Notes: a number of other people i have spoke to have the same (or similar)
problem.

Also Josef Karthauser made me send the PR (:
How-To-Repeat: 
lament:~# cd /usr/ports/x11-wm/sawfish && make
